description: Lock gate exceptions — entries that bypass the module lock gate. See docs/runbook-module-lock.md for unlock procedures. Schema docs at lock_gate_exceptions.schema.md.

exceptions.scope_description: Bootstrap exception BTCAAAAA-1486: initial creation of the lock gate itself. The gate must be created before it can enforce itself. Approved per plan BTCAAAAA-1479 §1.
Bootstrap exception BTCAAAAA-1486: initial creation of the lock registry itself. The registry must be created before it can enforce itself. Approved per plan BTCAAAAA-1479 §1.
Bootstrap exception BTCAAAAA-1486: initial creation of the exceptions file itself. The exceptions file must be created before it can enforce itself. Approved per plan BTCAAAAA-1479 §1.
Bootstrap exception BTCAAAAA-1486: initial creation of the lock gate CI workflow. The workflow must be created before it can enforce itself. Approved per plan BTCAAAAA-1479 §1.
Plan BTCAAAAA-1491: update template to include mandatory 4-item QA sign-off checklist. Approved per plan BTCAAAAA-1479 §5 (Layer 5 QA template).

BTCAAAAA-2182 Fix 1: Add startTime pagination to _get_bars_binance() (unified_manager.py:526-531) and start_time param to rest_client.get_klines() (rest_client.py:296). Closes zero-trades regression — 4 incidents in 72h. Pattern from _fetch_binance_range() already in same file. Rollback risk: Low. Bounded to runtime backtest path only.
